meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup for No-Code Founders
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between vision and production. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build, iterate, and monetize your SaaS without writing code.
content.answer_block: Overcoming a lack of coding experience requires leveraging AI-native development environments. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform natural language requirements into production-ready architecture. This workflow shifts your role from manual coder to technical architect, allowing you to build, deploy, and iterate your SaaS MVP with unprecedented speed.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is filled with founders who had the vision but lacked the technical execution. You are sitting on a goldmine of an idea, but the barrier of 'no coding experience' feels like an insurmountable wall between you and your first dollar of MRR. The old way—hiring expensive agencies or spending years learning syntax—is dead.

Today, we bridge that gap. By deploying Claude Code alongside Antigravity, you aren't just 'writing code'; you are orchestrating an AI-driven development lifecycle. This is the new standard for the AI Builder: move from high-level logic to functional, scalable architecture in hours, not months. Let’s turn your idea into a revenue-generating asset.

steps.title: Initializing the AI-Native Workspace
steps.description: Establish a robust project structure that Claude Code can interpret effectively. We define the business logic and tech stack upfront.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project scaffold for a SaaS MVP using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Implement a clean, modular directory structure optimized for AI-assisted development.

steps.title: Defining the Data Schema
steps.description: Translate your business entities into database models. This ensures your MVP has a solid foundation for user management and data persistence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for profiles, subscriptions, and core product features with proper foreign key constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add-feature 'Database Schema for User and Subscription Management'

steps.title: Building the Authentication Layer
steps.description: Security is non-negotiable. We implement industry-standard auth flows without touching the underlying cryptographic complexity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Supabase Auth integration with the existing project scaffold. Ensure protected routes are enforced for all dashboard access points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Supabase Auth with protected route middleware'

steps.title: Implementing Core Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the unique value proposition. We use the AI to write the specific functions that differentiate your product from competitors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for the [Insert Feature Name] module. Ensure it handles edge cases and returns structured JSON responses for the frontend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude build 'Core business logic for [Feature Name] module'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Before shipping, verify your code. We use the AI to write and execute integration tests to ensure your MVP doesn't break.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the core business logic components. Run the test suite and resolve any identified regression issues.

pro_tips: Always provide Claude Code with 'context files' (markdown summaries of your business requirements) to prevent AI drift during long sessions.
Use the 'claude diff' command to manually review code changes before committing; never blindly accept AI-generated pull requests.
Keep your prompt granularity high; split massive feature requests into 5-10 smaller, atomic tasks to maintain higher code quality.
Leverage the Antigravity 'architectural map' to visualize your project structure, which helps you guide Claude more effectively during complex refactors.
Treat your codebase like a living document; if the AI output gets messy, use a 'refactor' command to consolidate logic and remove technical debt.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, focus on deploying to Vercel and setting up your Stripe integration to start processing payments immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about your SaaS and start shipping it. The only difference between a founder and a dreamer is the ability to execute. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
